Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Afroman found not liable in defamation case brought by Ohio cops who raided home 207 upvotes, 28 comments
  2. OpenRocket 610 upvotes, 105 comments
  3. Show HN: I built 48 lightweight SVG backgrounds you can copy/paste 301 upvotes, 59 comments
  4. Autoresearch for SAT Solvers 141 upvotes, 28 comments
  5. Nvidia greenboost: transparently extend GPU VRAM using system RAM/NVMe 386 upvotes, 97 comments
  6. Conway's Game of Life, in real life 196 upvotes, 45 comments
  7. Wander – A tiny, decentralised tool to explore the small web 303 upvotes, 76 comments
  8. Why Cloudflare rule order matters? 55 upvotes, 9 comments
  9. Cook: A simple CLI for orchestrating Claude Code 239 upvotes, 64 comments
  10. 'Your Frustration Is the Product' 36 upvotes, 7 comments
  11. Show HN: Duplicate 3 layers in a 24B LLM, logical deduction .22→.76. No training 159 upvotes, 56 comments
  12. RX – a new random-access JSON alternative 113 upvotes, 43 comments
  13. A sufficiently detailed spec is code 442 upvotes, 235 comments
  14. Czech Man's Stone in Barn's Foundations Is Rare Bronze Age Spearhead Mold 60 upvotes, 24 comments
  15. LotusNotes 117 upvotes, 57 comments
  16. Warranty Void If Regenerated 408 upvotes, 239 comments
  17. The math that explains why bell curves are everywhere 157 upvotes, 89 comments
  18. Show HN: Pano, a bookmarking tool built around shareable shelves 29 upvotes, 11 comments
  19. Ask HN: AWS account restricted 18h despite remediation (Case 177385077300217) 5 upvotes, 0 comments
  20. Pretraining Language Models via Neural Cellular Automata 8 upvotes, 1 comments
  21. Nvidia NemoClaw 336 upvotes, 220 comments
  22. Show HN: Browser grand strategy game for hundreds of players on huge maps 42 upvotes, 20 comments
  23. Iran war energy shock sparks global push to reduce fossil fuel dependence 39 upvotes, 19 comments
  24. Stdwin: Standard window interface by Guido Van Rossum [pdf] 45 upvotes, 23 comments
  25. Mozilla to launch free built-in VPN in upcoming Firefox 149 184 upvotes, 124 comments
  26. Eniac, the First General-Purpose Digital Computer, Turns 80 37 upvotes, 18 comments
  27. 2% of ICML papers desk rejected because the authors used LLM in their reviews 115 upvotes, 96 comments
  28. Denmark was reportedly preparing for full-scale war with the US over Greenland 229 upvotes, 222 comments
  29. Austin’s surge of new housing construction drove down rents 615 upvotes, 720 comments
  30. Show HN: Will my flight have Starlink? 237 upvotes, 309 comments

Last generated 9:00pm, 19 March 2026. Source here.
